ability: 当你存活时，你提交的咒语不会被抽中。如果你死亡，会按提交顺序释放所有之前提交过的咒语(提交过的咒语可能因被说书人否决而变成哑咒)。
otherNightReminder: If the Wellspring is dead, place the "Magic Spring" token on them and cast all their previously-submitted spells in order of submission, ignoring the maximum Spell limit. (Remember, any of these spells can be vetoed as "Duds"!)
